serverInfo.name: sap.mcp/data_sharing_cockpit
serverInfo.title: data_sharing_cockpit
serverInfo.description: MCP server for the data_sharing_cockpit service.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers
tools.description: Returns a list of all the data providers.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers
tools.description: Creates a new data provider.

tools.name: accessProvider
tools.description: Lists all the properties of a certain data provider.

tools.name: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_identifier
tools.description: Overwrites all the properties of a data provider.

tools.name: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_identifier
tools.description: Updates selected properties of the specified data provider.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_activationKeys
tools.description: Returns a list of all activation keys for a data provider.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_activationKeys
tools.description: Generates activation keys for a data provider.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_activationKeys_massDelete
tools.description: Deletes all activation keys for a data provider.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products
tools.description: Returns a list of all existing data products.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products
tools.description: Creates a new data product.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID
tools.description: Lists all the properties of a single data product.

tools.name: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID
tools.description: Overwrites all the properties of a specified data product.

tools.name: DELETE_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID
tools.description: Deletes an existing data product.

tools.name: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID
tools.description: Updates only selected properties of a specified data product.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_changeLifecycleStatus
tools.description: Changes the lifecycle status of a data product.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_consumer_products_productUUID_install
tools.description: Install a product for a consumer.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products
tools.description: Returns a list of all data products of a data provider.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products
tools.description: Creates a new data product for a specified data provider.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products_productIdentifier
tools.description: Lists all the properties of a data product by technical ID.

tools.name: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products_productIdentifier
tools.description: Overwrites all the properties of a specified data product for a provider.

tools.name: DELETE_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products_productIdentifier
tools.description: Deletes an existing data product of a specified data provider.

tools.name: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products_productIdentifier
tools.description: Updates selected properties of a data product for a provider.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_products_productIdentifier_changeLifecycleStatus
tools.description: Changes the lifecycle status of a data product for a provider.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses
tools.description: Returns a list of all licenses for a data provider.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses
tools.description: Creates a new license.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_massDelete
tools.description: Deletes all licenses from a data provider.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID
tools.description: Lists all the properties of a specified license.

tools.name: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID
tools.description: Overwrites all the properties of a specified license.

tools.name: DELETE_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID
tools.description: Deletes an existing license.

tools.name: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID
tools.description: Updates some properties of a specified license.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_changeLifecycleStatus
tools.description: Changes the lifecycle status of a license.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_products
tools.description: Returns a list of all data products assigned to a license.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_products
tools.description: Assigns data products to a license.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_products_massDelete
tools.description: Unassigns all data products from a specified license.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_activationKeys
tools.description: Returns a list of all activation keys for a license.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_activationKeys
tools.description: Generates activation keys for a license.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_activationKeys_assignUsers
tools.description: Allocate users to existing activation keys.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_licenses_licenseUUID_activationKeys_massDelete
tools.description: Deletes all activation keys from a license.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases
tools.description: Returns a list of all releases of a data product.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases
tools.description: Creates a new release for a data product.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID
tools.description: Lists all properties of a specified release.

tools.name: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID
tools.description: Overwrites all properties of a specified release.

tools.name: DELETE_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID
tools.description: Deletes a release for a specified data product.

tools.name: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID
tools.description: Updates some properties of a specified release.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID_publish
tools.description: Publishes a release to make data product updates available.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID_lock
tools.description: Locks a certain release of a data product.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_releaseUUID_unlock
tools.description: Unlocks a certain release of a data product.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_lockAll
tools.description: Locks all releases of a data product.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_products_productUUID_releases_unlockAll
tools.description: Unlocks all releases of a data product.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts
tools.description: Returns a list of all contexts of a data provider.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts
tools.description: Creates a new context for a data provider.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID
tools.description: Lists all properties of a context.

tools.name: PUT_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID
tools.description: Overwrites all properties of a context.

tools.name: DELETE_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID
tools.description: Deletes an existing context from a data provider.

tools.name: PATCH_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID
tools.description: Updates selected properties of a context.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID_changeLifecycleStatus
tools.description: Changes the lifecycle status of a context.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_leave
tools.description: Leaves a context of a data provider.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_join
tools.description: Joins a context of a data provider.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_massDelete
tools.description: Deletes all contexts from a data provider.

tools.name: GET_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID_activationKeys
tools.description: Returns a list of all activation keys for a context.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID_activationKeys
tools.description: Generates activation keys for a context.

tools.name: POST_v1_datasphere_marketplace_dsc_providers_providerUUID_contexts_contextUUID_activationKeys_massDelete
tools.description: Deletes all activation keys from a context.
